changes.description: Refined Home Dashboard with responsive mobile layouts and fluid spacing
Consolidated database migrations into clean 'create' files for better maintainability
Added dynamic environment-aware snapshot scheduling for Docker deployments
Moved application history to static JSON for persistent release notes without database dependencies
Integrated Economy Module with Income and Savings tracking
Improved Todo List with due date categories and status filtering
Added Administrative UI for module activation and system settings
Initial Release of Homeplanner core system
Support for Google Authentication and Multi-user households
Basic Shopping List and Todo management modules
